title: 2024 MediSave Bonus
text:
2024 MediSave Bonus - SupportGoWhere
2024 MediSave Bonus
Share link
Helps Singapore Citizens offset healthcare costs and build up their medical savings for old age.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible Singapore Citizens can receive one-off CPF bonus of up to $500
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

One-off CPF bonus of up to $500, tiered by age, Annual Value of residence, and number of properties owned.

Who is this for?

Born in 1974 to 2003

Singapore Citizen

How to apply?

No application required.

Where can I find help?

Hotline: 1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 16 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
